summary: The release anchor is extraction-faithful for the registry-extracted D+Q bone outcomes and results it includes. It does not claim full publication table extraction, subgroup extraction, or complete supplement extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: The accepted outcome and result records are bounded to ClinicalTrials.gov posted results and PubMed metadata or abstract support.
findings.why_it_matters: Consumers can treat the records as registry-extracted evidence without mistaking them for full-text-extracted results.
findings.recommended_action: Preserve maturity and provenance fields that identify the records as registry-extracted.

findings.claim_or_issue: Full publication tables, supplements, and detailed subgroup values are not accepted by this anchor.
findings.why_it_matters: The system should release stable registry data while still routing richer full-text extraction to later agents.
findings.recommended_action: Keep full publication extraction visible in extraction debt and future Codex jobs.
